title: Tab strip = open-set + Agents/History header panel (lazy resume on click)

tests.cmd: npx vitest run tests/dev-env-sessions-endpoints.test.ts (backend contract the UI consumes)
tests.summary: DS suite 36/36 green (endpoints incl. agents/history/open + reboot-restore). UI behaviour evidenced by live screenshot (tab strip = open-set; Agents panel grouped by project with status dots + isOpen tags). A committed playwright e2e for the Fitting UI was not added — evidence is the screenshot + the committed endpoint contract.

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (main.tsx + new session-panels.tsx in tsc scope)

lint.summary: n/a — fitting UI bundled by esbuild, not next lint

e2e.summary: live screenshot evidence (tabs=open-set + Agents panel); committed e2e not added (slice blocked on cross-model)

codexReview.notes: Cross-model review never ran for DS3 — Codex/ChatGPT workspace ran out of credits during DS2 round 8 (see decisions.md). External blocker.

designAudit.notes: Sessions dropdown matches the existing header/menu visual language (var(--accent)/--border/--bg-2, same shadow + radius); status dots use --amber/--sage/--alarm. Not an independent frontend-design audit.

video.notes: Live screenshot evidence captured (/tmp/ds3-panel.png). Full walkthrough video deferred — the slice is blocked on the cross-model gate (Codex credits) regardless, so a verified video can't lift it to passed.

blockers.cause: external — Codex/ChatGPT workspace out of credits (same as DS2)
blockers.failedCommand: codex exec -s read-only --skip-git-repo-check -C <repo> --output-schema codex-review.schema.json --output-last-message <out> "<DS3 review prompt>"
blockers.error: ERROR: Your workspace is out of credits. Add credits to continue.
blockers.remediation: Operator must top up Codex/ChatGPT workspace credits; then run the DS3 cross-model review (3A + 3B) to clear.
blockers.impact: DS3 cross-model review never ran; objective gates (build/typecheck/endpoint tests) are green and the UI is screenshot-verified.
